notes.volume: Attach a persistent volume mounted at /data. SQLite DB, migrations state, and generated PDFs all live under /data.
envVars: BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_EMAIL=<real admin email> — creates ONE admin on first boot; teammates then invited via /team UI
BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_NAME=<display name> (optional, defaults to email local-part)
BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD=<password> (optional; if omitted, a random 16-char password is printed to deploy logs ONCE)
SEED_DEMO=1 to also create a demo client on first boot (idempotent, no-op if it already exists)
